entry.title: Jasmine IPA
entry.content:
Background

One of our favorite beers of all time is the Avatar Jasmine IPAfrom Elysian Brewing. So much so, in fact, that we’re going to try and replicate it from a series of other recipes. We’ve tried this before (to great success, might I add). This time around, we’re making some modifications to the now named,

Wrath of Khan Jasmine IPA

Desired Characteristics

From the Elysian Brewing website:

  • Style:
    • IPA
  • Body:
    • Medium
  • Color
    • Golden Copper
    • Roughly an SRM of 6
  • ABV:
    • 6.3
  • Aromatics:
    • Floral
    • Jasmine
  • Taste:
    • Balance of hoppiness and jasmine
  • IBU:
    • 45

Malts: Pale, Crystal, Munich and Cara-hell

Hops: Bittered with German Northern Brewer, finished with Glacier and Amarillo hops

Putting the recipe together
